parameters.query:
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_delivery_mode' THEN value END) AS default_delivery_mode,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_test_recipient' THEN value END) AS default_test_recipient,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_sender_name' THEN value END) AS email_sender_name,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_reply_to' THEN value END) AS email_reply_to,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'no_address_email_template_key' THEN value END) AS no_address_email_template_key,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_signature_template_key' THEN value END) AS email_signature_template_key
FROM public.global_settings
WHERE key IN (
  'email_delivery_mode',
  'email_test_recipient',
  'email_sender_name',
  'email_reply_to',
  'no_address_email_template_key',
  'email_signature_template_key'
);

parameters.jsCode:
const batchId = $('Resolve Batch Id').first().json.batch_id;
const sql = `WITH payer_items AS (
  SELECT
    i.batch_id,
    i.payer,
    MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(i.email_address), '')) AS email_address,
    MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(i.address_1), '')) AS address_1,
    MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(i.address_2), '')) AS address_2,
    MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(i.address_3), '')) AS address_3,
    MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(i.town), '')) AS town,
    MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(i.postcode), '')) AS postcode,
    COALESCE(SUM(i.parent_tags), 0)::int AS parent_tags,
    COALESCE(SUM(i.regular_tags), 0)::int AS regular_tags,
    COALESCE(SUM(i.key_tags), 0)::int AS keys,
    COALESCE(SUM(i.regular_tags + i.parent_tags + i.key_tags), 0)::int AS total_items
  FROM public.vw_signup_batch_items i
  WHERE i.batch_id = ${batchId}
    AND COALESCE(i.product, '') <> 'a. Social 2026'
  GROUP BY i.batch_id, i.payer
), best_member AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (CONCAT(rm."First name", ' ', rm."Last name"))
    CONCAT(rm."First name", ' ', rm."Last name") AS payer_name,
    rm."First name" AS first_name,
    rm."Last name" AS last_name,
    NULLIF(TRIM(rm."Email address"), '') AS email_address
  FROM public.raw_members rm
  WHERE COALESCE(rm.is_current, true) = true
  ORDER BY CONCAT(rm."First name", ' ', rm."Last name"),
           CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(rm."Email address"), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
           CASE WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rm."Status"), ''), '') = 'Active' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
)
SELECT
  p.batch_id,
  p.payer,
  COALESCE(bc.first_name, bm.first_name, split_part(p.payer, ' ', 1)) AS first_name,
  COALESCE(bc.last_name, bm.last_name, NULLIF(regexp_replace(p.payer, '^\\S+\\s*', ''), '')) AS last_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(bc.email_address), ''), p.email_address, bm.email_address) AS email_address,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(bc.address_1), ''), p.address_1) AS address_1,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(bc.address_2), ''), p.address_2) AS address_2,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(bc.town), ''), p.town) AS town,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(bc.postcode), ''), p.postcode) AS postcode,
  p.parent_tags,
  p.regular_tags,
  p.keys,
  p.total_items
FROM payer_items p
LEFT JOIN LATERAL public.resolve_best_contact_row(
  p.payer,
  p.email_address,
  NULLIF(regexp_replace(p.payer, '^\\S+\\s*', ''), ''),
  false
) bc ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN best_member bm
  ON p.payer = bm.payer_name
WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(bc.email_address), ''), p.email_address, bm.email_address) IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(bc.address_1), ''), p.address_1)), '') IS NULL
    OR NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(bc.postcode), ''), p.postcode)), '') IS NULL
  )
ORDER BY p.payer;`;
return [{ json: { batch_id: batchId, sql } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { message: `No recipients without postal addresses for batch ${$json.batch_id}`, batch_id: $json.batch_id, sent_count: 0, recipients: [] } }}
